sourceTitle: Using ChatGPT or other generative AI tool on a marked assessment
evidenceSnippetOriginal: By failing to comply with the instructor's specific instructions that you not use generative AI tools in writing your term paper, you have knowingly used an unauthorized aid in preparing your assignment. Any student using an unauthorized aid has committed an offence under the University's Code of Behaviour on Academic Matters
evidenceSnippetDisplay: By failing to comply with the instructor's specific instructions that you not use generative AI tools... you have knowingly used an unauthorized aid
evidenceLocator: Code of Behaviour on Academic Matters section
